overall settings.title: Moon Base
overall settings.description:
Start with a small {#779|base} that supports helium-3 mining, with plans to add more rooms for living and working. Investigate {#779|Selenids} to determine their purpose and where they are coming from.

Combat imagined by the initial setup is low-key, such as grabbing a nearby iron rod and swinging to dissuade or disable an enemy. It's also detailed, with ways to keep track of injuries to various body parts. *Be mindful of your suit—survival requires oxygen!*

items.name: Filled Helium-3 Container
items.description: Transfer the extracted helium-3 from the processor into storage containers. Helium-3 is used in fusion reactions, perhaps for general power or advanced weapons.

items.name: Metal Pole
items.description: Can be used as a two-handed weapon like a bat.

locations.name: Base
locations.description: Food, bed, shower.  Life support systems, a greenhouse for food production, and laboratories for scientific research.

locations.name: Regolith Processing Plant
locations.description: An area rich in regolith with high concentrations of helium-3. The facility covers several acres and includes the processing equipment, storage units for helium-3, and solar panels for power.

locations.name: Track
locations.description: Electric vehicle on a simple pressurized track system to protect against lunar dust.

characters.name: Selen
characters.description: Renegade robot that lives underground. Solar powered.

attribs.name: Dexterity
attribs.description: Affects accuracy. Hampered by space suits.

attribs.name: Hostility
attribs.description: Whether a minor character sees a main character as an enemy.

events.name: Attack Success
events.description: Whether the attack misses or otherwise fails.

events.name: Keep Peaceful
events.description: Failures are likely to increase hostility.

events.name: Repair or Heal
events.description: Attempt to repair robot's body. Could also be used to treat a living creature's wounds.
